feed.title: AO3 - Trans Tim Drake (DCU) (Filtered)

entry.title: Young Justice Can Have a Little Evil As a Treat
entry.summary:
Author: Brownies96

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 78,700Chapters: 32/35Kudos: 1,597

Summary: Tim snorts, “Right. Obviously, that’s not the full story, but you were in space so we’re good.” He activates the tablet and shows Hal familiar paperwork. “I’ve come to the conclusion that if the League is going to treat me like I’m an unstable rogue, they’re going to have to commit to the bit.”After being treated like unwanted children all their lives, Tim, Kon, Cassie, and Bart start to realise that the adulthood set out before them isn't much better than the past their leaving behind. They decide it's time to make their own way in the world, even if it means being labelled as 'evil'

entry.title: Catgirls Can Have A Little Theft, As A Treat
entry.summary:
Author: atomicpanda

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 85,452Chapters: 54/?Kudos: 452

Summary: Waking up as a tween catgirl in the DCU, a self insert into Gotham experiences the thrills of the masked nightlife, fails to combat her new urge to steal, and fails to combat her new feline instincts, all while working towards her goal of bringing good music to a Deathworld. Armed with the power of adorableness and also a deck of cards that hold a unique path to Power, Allison "AlleyKat" Kyle may not shake the world, but she sure as heck is going to knock it off the ledge.

entry.title: I'll Cover You
entry.summary:
Author: Lancelot15

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,483Chapters: 13/32Kudos: 97

Summary: Tim Drake is Transgender, and he was pretty sure he was completely and utterly alone in that.That is until his friend Kon-El comes out to him during a late night talk.Suddenly, the two find themselves looking out for each other and beginning to care about each other in different ways than before.(I suck at summaries)

entry.title: Imperfect Resurrection
entry.summary:
Author: Neptune_09

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,091Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 6

Summary: Timothy Jackson Drake is coming apart in ways he can’t explain out loud. Everything feels like it’s speeding up—days blurring together, conversations slipping past him—and no one else seems to notice. Or worse, they notice and don’t care. He can feel himself being replaced. It makes sense, doesn’t it? Bruce has a real son now. Blood. Legacy. Something that actually belongs. Not something that had to force its way in, not something temporary. Why would Bruce hold onto him when he has that? Tim tries to tell himself he’s imagining it, that it’s just stress, just pressure—but the thought won’t leave. It sits there, constant, heavy, impossible to ignore. And underneath all of it, there’s something else. Something quieter, but worse. Grief that never really left. If Kon were still here, things would make sense. Kon would say something stupid just to make him laugh, or call him out for overthinking everything. He’d know what to do. He always did. But he’s not here. And Tim can’t fix any of this. Except maybe—maybe that’s not true. Maybe there *is* a way to fix it. He just hasn’t found it yet.

entry.title: Black Out Days
entry.summary:
Author: Fool4Toga

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,043Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: It would be perfect, maybe, if this was different. If they took their time. Tim closes his eyes, his head feeling a little bit clearer, and lets his hand drift down to his t-dick. He jerks it slowly, imagining his ideal first time with Jason, instead of focusing on this.Jason would kiss him slowly and they’d grind a bit. Perhaps Jason would make a sly comment on how wet Tim is for him. He’d ask Tim if he could mark his body. Tim would say yes, but below the neck. Jason would oblige. Tim’s first orgasm would be with Jason holding him as he humped Jason’s thigh. Jason would praise him through it, whispering sweet nothings into Tim’s ear. He’d call Tim his good boy. Tim would cry in this version, too, but they’d be tears of happiness. Of feeling loved.

entry.summary:
Author: januarysnowdrop

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,008Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 30

Summary: Most people are born with soulmarks; shadowy handprints that mark the place where their soulmate touches them in a way that makes their heart race. I like the tim tries to clone kon and ends up with a baby too much so i wrote one because im in too deep baby. And btw theres a twist and my own OC who may be a little bit OP but shhh English IS my 1st langugue so its not that good. also ppl are reading my shit now so thats crazy. entry.title: Kon-el’s Ultimate Guide Book to Surviving Another Universe
entry.summary:
Author: Alphaghetti_24

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,426Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 57

Summary: Imagine you’re walking down the street then suddenly BOOM! you've been blasted into a new universe. Yeah right! As if! Well… not as if for Kon. He’s really gonna kick himself later for this… Nevertheless, he’s gotta try and figure this shit out and hopefully get home before his friends follow him to this other world ready to commit heinous war crimes. He’s really… really… hopeful that doesn’t happen. -OR- Kon-el is sent to the Young Justice Cartoon world! (Rewrite of Skyrocket’s guide to surviving another universe)

entry.title: we can go forever, until you wanna sit it out
entry.summary:
Author: dickweed7

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,892Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 111

Summary: He held two things in his hands. Tim's eyes dropped to them before they'd fully processed anything else in the room. The first was a matte-black ball gag with a bright blue strap—Kon’s favorite color, because Kon was completely a sap, and they had reached an unspoken agreement never to say so directly. The silicone ball was the right size, smooth and firm, the kind that spread the jaw to exactly the right amount. They'd calibrated this through trial and error, which was a process Tim kept extremely private and which Kon had approached with the same meticulous precision he brought to most things that mattered to him. The strap was already adjusted to the correct notch. It would warm quickly against skin. The second was a small red clicker --- aka timkon smut

entry.summary:

entry.title: Bloody Legacy
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,974Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 89

Summary: The Red Hood surprises him by slowly pulling off the helmet. He wears a black domino underneath, curls of black hair falling into his face. Black hair… and a little white streak right in the front. Gnarly scars mar most of the right side of his face. Tim's mind churns. He looks familiar, but… but that's impossible, right. "I slept on the streets," he continues, setting his helmet down on the shelf to his left, one hand laying over it almost protectively. "I lived in the alleyways of Gotham. Trying to survive. Until Bruce took me in." No, Tim's mind rebels, even as realization sinks in. It's not possible… Before Tim can even think of something to say, Jason rips away the front of his shirt. Revealing bright red. A bold yellow R over his right breast. "I trained as hard as I could. I did whatever he asked… At least at first. But it didn't matter. They said I wasn't tough enough to be Robin. But today they say you are." All Tim can do is stare at this six foot wall of muscle standing across from him. The Robin uniform is clearly a cheap costume, the fabric thin and flimsy, the seams straining against the bulge of his muscles. Robin. Jason Todd. Alive. Here.

entry.title: Hate is a Bottomless Cup; I will Pour and Pour
entry.summary:
Author: gleamingmermaid

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 11,368Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 288

Summary: Tim Drake refuses to join Ra's Al Ghul. Ra's Al Ghul's obsession with Tim Drake takes a dark turn when Ra's captures him to make him sire his heir to succeed him as the Demon's Head. Tim Drake battles his worst nightmares as he plans to free himself and destroy everything Ra's has built, once and for all. Meanwhile, his family bands together and will not leave any stone unturned until Tim is back with them safe and sound.

entry.title: i can't love you(how you want me to)
entry.summary:
Author: wensbat

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,838Chapters: 6/8Kudos: 32

Summary: Going undercover once again as Caroline Hill, she found she couldn’t help but feel a little more comfortable in her own skin when she was dressed and referred to in the way that matched “her disguise”. She still had a long way to go before she’d fully feel like she could be herself openly in this way, but getting a taste of “living as Caroline” made it harder and harder to deny these feelings. Heading back to her safehouse after getting information at the place she works she's stopped by a mugger little do that and Carol know Superboy shows up to put a stop to this. Refusing to leave until he knows that she'll get home safe starts a wonderful night that neither of them want to end.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Tim Drake/Kon-El | Conner Kent
  • Tim Drake (DCU)
  • Kon-El | Conner Kent
  • Trans Tim Drake
  • Meet-Cute
  • Kind Of
  • Tim Drake Has a Crush on Kon-El | Conner Kent
  • Protective Kon-El | Conner Kent
  • Trans Female Tim Drake
  • Tim Drake Has a Different Name
  • Her New Name is Caroline Wayne
  • Autistic Tim Drake (DCU)
  • Internalized Transphobia
  • Hurt/Comfort
  • Fluff
  • Happy Ending

entry.title: How to Make a Best Friend, Step One: A Brick
entry.summary:
Author: Bullshark_Kid

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,515Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 40

Summary: “Hi, there, masked figure. Can I ask why you were breaking into a warehouse that seemingly doesn’t belong to you in the middle of the night?”They twisted in his grip, wiggling and trying to escape.He began to speak again when a brick hit him in the jaw.That hurt.Or: Tim meets his new best friend, Steph hits a weird short kid in the face with a brick, Batman's a Bitch, and Stephanie Brown continues to be awesome while solving a quarter of Gotham's problems, while creating the rest.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Stephanie Brown & Tim Drake
  • Tim Drake (DCU)
  • Bruce Wayne
  • Stephanie Brown & Tim Drake are Best Friends
  • Child Abuse

  • Neurodivergent Tim Drake (DCU)
  • Fights
  • bricks
  • Tim Drake is a Menace (DCU)
  • Stephanie Brown is a Menace
  • Jack Drake is Not Tim Drake's Biological Parent
  • Bad Parent Bruce Wayne
  • But he'll get better after lots of therapy
  • And Selina will probably slap him at some point
